title: L&D Training Effectiveness Report - devops
executiveSummary: The selected scope contains 1 course(s), 1 completed course(s), and 10 trainee-course records. Overall attendance is 96%, completion is 100%, pass rate is 100%, and average score is 7.89/10. Total training hours are 216 and scaled cost is 15. Overall effectiveness classification is Effective. Management interpretation: The training program for the DevOps Fundamentals course has demonstrated strong performance metrics, indicating a high level of engagement and effectiveness among participants.
insights: DevOps Fundamentals: CI/CD, K8s, Monitoring has an effectiveness score of 92.28 in the selected scope.
The course achieved a 96% attendance rate, with all 10 trainees completing the course and achieving a 100% pass rate.
The average score of 7.89 out of 10 reflects a solid understanding of the material.
Additionally, the feedback rating of 4.6 out of 5 suggests that trainees found the course content and delivery to be highly satisfactory.
The total training hours amounted to 216, with a scaled cost of 15, resulting in an effectiveness score of 92.28.
recommendations: Maintain the current delivery model and reuse top-performing materials for future cohorts.
To maintain and enhance the effectiveness of future training sessions, it is recommended to continue leveraging successful course elements that contributed to high engagement and satisfaction.

checklist.detail: Required sheets and columns were mapped from Teams, OneDrive, Forms, KPI, Rules and Template sources.
Expected attendance rows are trainee count x total sessions. Late is retained for metrics as partial attendance.
Completed courses require one valid assessment and pass-status row per trainee.
NORM-14 requires at least 60% feedback response rate for valid analysis.
Duplicate rows and numeric ranges were checked before metric generation.

checklist.check: Consistency: course ID and pass-status logic
checklist.detail: Cross-source course IDs and pass-status logic were checked against the selected course catalog.

approval.note: User requested: "Finalize report này". Selected draft artifact context indicates Evidence Gate PASS and classification Effective. A default full-scope readiness re-check returned BLOCKED due to other courses in the broad default scope; please human-review scope alignment before finalization.
